title: Create Crushable Deepslate
description: Add-On for Create making you able to crush deepslate and make ore farms.
body:
Creat Crushable Deepslate is an add-on for Create mod, whic makes you able to make an ore farm usuing deepslate. You can crush it into a deepslate powder and then using a fan get ore pieces which can be then transformed into ingots.
P. s.: install JEI mod for more recipe details
